title: Cloud Support Engineer (Kubernetes and Container Service)
description: Help organizations work backwards from business and reliability goals to deploy, operate, and troubleshoot containerized workloads on AWS, mainly Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) and Elastic Container Service (ECS). Investigate critical production issues and provide root cause analysis.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Owned backend delivery for a core financial risk management product suite. Engineered high-performance services for market data and risk calculations, reducing system latency from 1000ms to 10ms.

title: Software Engineer
description: Built backend features with stronger test coverage, clean code practices, Redis caching, and MySQL data flows so software could move safely from development into production.

title: Software Engineer
institution: Axiata Digital Labs, Colombo, Sri Lanka
description: Modernized legacy telecommunications applications into microservices and migrated workloads from on-premises Kubernetes to AWS EKS.
